strong_bet.rationale: Jun 5: ATH/HOU Over (+37.5%) lost 6-0, SF/CHC Under (+21.4%) lost 21-0. Both 3-sigma outliers but xERA model overconfident on game totals. Weight reduced from 1.10 to 0.90 pending 5-game stabilisation.

value_bet.rationale: Jun 5: 3/6 (50%) value picks. Road ML value plays (CIN VALUE_DOG, SEA, SD, MIA) all lost. Slight penalty from 0.80 to 0.75. Monitor road ML subset specifically.

marginal_bet.rationale: 0/4 all-time. Suppressed to near-zero — marginal picks now output as LEAN only, no full CANDIDATE stake.

MLB.note: Jun 5 rough night dragged from 0.75. Game totals sub-model needs variance padding.

moneyline.note: Dragged by road dogs Jun 5. VALUE_DOG 0/1. Road ML picks now require CANDIDATE + secondary signal OR VALUE_DOG + 3-game win trend to qualify.

total_runs.note: MIL/COL Over hit (16 runs), ATH/HOU Over and SF/CHC Under both missed badly. HIGH_VARIANCE_BAND widening from 0.50 to 0.65 — captures more uncertain totals games.

HIGH_VARIANCE_BAND.reason: SF/CHC and ATH/HOU both had model Δ > 1.0 but were classified as clean. Wider band suppresses more uncertain total picks to LEAN.

away_sp_variance_flag.reason: SEA ML lost: Robbie Ray projected well but road SP outings have high single-game variance. Away starter picks now require FIP edge >= 0.04 (was 0.03) to qualify as CANDIDATE.

value_dog_road_ml_gate.new: require 3-game win trend OR sharp money signal on VALUE_DOG fires
value_dog_road_ml_gate.reason: First live VALUE_DOG fire (CIN) lost 3-10. STL had underlying strength not captured by season RD alone. Adding win-trend gate as secondary condition.
